TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tjatjigel, title = Tjatjigel, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjatjigel} }

S.FORM: alang Tjatjigel ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Tayimari go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 354 buwan, 780 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 79% kyan ku 616 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 21% kyan ku 164 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 11%, Paywan 66%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjatjigel hya' ga Calavi. tay 'zil na Tjatjigel hya' ga Kiring. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tjatjigel ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Tayimari go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 354 buwan, 780 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 79% kyan ku 616 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 21% kyan ku 164 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 11%, Paywan 66%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjatjigel hya' ga Calavi. tay 'zil na Tjatjigel hya' ga Kiring. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjatjiɣel ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajimari ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan **%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na tjatjiɣel ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨala*i. taj ʔzil na tjatjiɣel ħjaʔ ɣa kiriŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
